debt_items.summary: Preserve active touch buttons when another finger presses; single active pointer state could strand a held D-pad direction.

closure.evidence_ref: docs/review-debt-closeout.md records the PR #2 P1 touch repair; src/game/input.test.ts covers per-pointer button tracking.

debt_items.summary: Ignore menu taps outside rendered options so empty overlay space cannot trigger the last menu item.

closure.evidence_ref: src/game/game.ts rejects selectMenuIndex values outside the current menu items; src/game/input.test.ts covers button bounds and row gaps.

debt_items.summary: Ignore stale command sequences so delayed older online input cannot overwrite newer authoritative input.

closure.evidence_ref: docs/review-debt-closeout.md records the PR #3 command sequencing repair; packages/shared/src/multiplayer.test.ts verifies stale seq 1 cannot overwrite seq 2.

debt_items.summary: Refresh vision memory from every teammate instead of only the first teammate on a team.

closure.evidence_ref: docs/review-debt-closeout.md records the PR #3 vision memory repair; packages/shared/src/multiplayer.test.ts verifies a second teammate's sight produces last-known memory.

debt_items.summary: Color relay capture progress by the capturing team during neutral capture or takeover.

closure.evidence_ref: docs/review-debt-closeout.md records the PR #5 relay color repair; src/online/onlineRenderer.test.ts covers neutral capture and takeover progress colors.

debt_items.summary: Snap player positions on respawn jumps instead of interpolating from the death cell to the spawn across hidden cells.

closure.evidence_ref: src/online/onlineInterpolation.ts snaps across alive-state changes and teleport-sized deltas; src/online/onlineInterpolation.test.ts covers respawn snapping.

debt_items.summary: Keep last-known enemy markers out of the live minimap when they are outside current visible cells.

closure.evidence_ref: src/online/onlineMinimap.ts filters lastKnown by visibleCells; src/online/onlineMinimap.test.ts covers hidden and visible last-known markers.

debt_items.summary: Preserve buttons held by another input source so keyboard release cannot clear an active canvas D-pad hold.

closure.evidence_ref: src/online/onlineInput.ts tracks held buttons per source; src/online/onlineClient.ts and src/game/input.ts route keyboard/pointer sources; src/online/onlineInput.test.ts covers hybrid holds.

debt_items.summary: Handle FFA bot kills that exhaust the objective so a campaign level cannot stay playing with no enemies left to spawn.

closure.evidence_ref: src/game/game.ts completes FFA when the neutral pool is exhausted and no tanks remain; src/game/game.test.ts covers exhausted FFA objective completion.

debt_items.summary: Aim assault defenders at hostile tanks instead of their own command core.

closure.evidence_ref: src/game/game.ts sends assault defenders toward hostiles before objective fallback; src/game/game.test.ts covers hostile targeting and real hostile line-of-fire.
